name: vibe-wrap
description: Vibe Wrap — canary channel. Tracks the main branch of the solo repo. For the stable release pinned to a tagged version, install via the aggregated 626Labs marketplace at github.com/estevanhernandez-stack-ed/vibe-plugins.

plugins.name: vibe-wrap
plugins.description: Session wrap-up that reads the breadcrumb trail your toolkit already left — not a cold reconstruction. Surfaces what shipped, what's uncommitted, and what's unpushed, then gates commit + push interactively. Reads sibling vibe-plugin session-logs / friction / wins, git state, and a pluggable decision log (Markdown / JSONL / 626Labs MCP / disabled). Bumper-lanes invariant — every gate defaults to no-action.
